plan.failureSummary: The test failed during deterministic (cached) execution because it could not locate the 'Select your occupation' combobox using the stored selectors.
observedIndicators: Error: click execution failed (Unable to resolve HTML element)
Instruction 'Fill out the all of the survey questions' is semantically flexible

remediationSteps.summary: Clear Page AI cache and retry the test.
remediationSteps.details: Execute the test with 'clearPageAiCache: true' to force a fresh autonomous run that can adapt to UI changes.
If the failure persists after clearing the cache, verify that the 'Select your occupation' field is rendering correctly and is interactable in the 'unstable-survey' environment.

plan.notes: The failure occurred in deterministic mode (cache), which is highly susceptible to selector changes on the 'unstable-survey' application. Since the prompt 'Fill out all of the survey questions' is semantically flexible, clearing the cache will allow the AI to find the updated selectors.
